advisory.reason: Baseline threshold (0.3) already yielded 50 nodes. Lowering threshold is likely unnecessary noise.

pilot_evaluation.reason: Uncertain topology or borderline metrics - Manual calibration needed.

model_policy_reason: Production Policy v1: Haiku-only due to graph density ceiling

questions.question: What are the core principles of the USB Log Explorer (Antigravity Edition)?
questions.justification: The synthesis text lists the 4 core principles of the USB Log Explorer: Vendor Command Awareness, No Guessing, Performance First, and Privacy.

questions.question: What are the three data layers defined in the Data Truth Model?
questions.justification: The synthesis text describes the three data layers: HID_HDR (Event Layer), HID_META (Semantic Layer), and HID_RAW (Payload Layer).

questions.question: What are the key mapping rules for the Vendor Command Registry?
questions.justification: The synthesis text lists the key mapping rules for the Vendor Command Registry, including ISP, I2C, PD, and Security commands.
